sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69732" key="nardoliph/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ναρδολῐπής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">λίπος</etym>) <sense id="n69732.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">anointed with nard-oil,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.254</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Myrin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
